macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: US Stocks Rebound Strongly Led by Tech and AI News
items.summary: Major US indices rose sharply: Dow Jones +0.76-0.80% to around 49,147-49,196, S&P 500 +0.77-0.79% to 6,890-6,891, Nasdaq +1.04-1.07% to 22,863-22,870, driven by AMD's 8.8-13% surge after multi-billion AI deal with Meta.

items.title: AMD Surges on Meta AI Infrastructure Deal
items.summary: Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) jumped 8.8-13% following reports of a multi-year, multi-billion dollar commitment from Meta for AI infrastructure, boosting tech sector recovery.

items.title: Asian Markets Soar with Nikkei Hitting New Record
items.summary: Japan's Nikkei rose 2.2% to a new record high, South Korea's Kospi +1.9% breaking 6000, supported by tech and chip stocks; Hong Kong +0.69%, Shanghai +0.72%, amid Bank of Japan dovish signals from PM Takaichi.

items.title: US Tariffs Increase to 15% as Global Trade Tensions Rise
items.summary: A global 10% US tariff took effect, with reports of a formal increase to 15%; markets remain sensitive to tariff developments amid geopolitical dominance over fundamentals.

items.title: Nvidia Set for Q4 Earnings After Market Close
items.summary: Nvidia (NVDA) scheduled to report fiscal Q4 2026 results on February 25 after close, amid heightened focus on AI and chip sector performance.

items.title: European Markets Rise on Financial Earnings
items.summary: European indices gained: FTSE 100 +0.8% on HSBC and St. James's Place earnings beats (+5.5% and +4.5%), Italian FTSE MIB +0.7% on bank recovery; Italian banks like Unicredit +1.2%.

items.title: Bank of Japan Dovish Tilt on PM Takaichi's Board Picks
items.summary: Japanese PM Takaichi proposed academic nominees for BoJ board, signaling dovish lean and yen weakness (JPY down 0.8%); yields fell 3-5bps across curve.

items.title: US Dollar Strengthens Modestly, Yields Mixed
items.summary: DXY +0.19% to 97.88 then -0.2% to 97.692; US 2-year yield +2.3bps to 3.461%, 10-year -0.2bps to 4.029%, amid improved risk sentiment.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: ZachXBT Teases Major Insider Trading Investigation Dropping February 26
items.summary: Blockchain investigator ZachXBT announced a bombshell probe into insider trading by multiple employees at one of crypto's most profitable businesses, set for reveal on February 26. Markets are reacting with speculation on targets like Meteora and Pump.fun, potentially causing significant volatility.

items.title: Bitcoin Drops Below $65K Amid Trump Tariff Announcement and $500M Liquidations
items.summary: Bitcoin fell to around $64,300-$64,400 following U.S. President Trump's new 15% global tariff executive order, sparking inflation fears and over $500 million in leveraged position liquidations. The market entered 'Extreme Fear' territory with intense selling pressure.

items.title: Vitalik Buterin Moves 428+ ETH to Stablecoins Amid Market Turmoil
items.summary: On-chain data shows Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin converting over 428 ETH into stablecoins, trending as #VitalikSells during Bitcoin's sharp decline. Bitdeer also reportedly sold its entire 943 BTC holdings, amplifying whale selling pressure.

items.title: Crypto Markets Brace for High Turbulence with Nvidia Earnings and Bitcoin Options Expiry
items.summary: Markets face three days of volatility including Nvidia results today, ZachXBT's insider trading reveal tomorrow, and Bitcoin options closure on Friday. Tensions from U.S.-Iran issues and other factors add to the uncertainty.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: MIT Develops AI Framework for Multimodal Cell Biology Analysis
items.summary: Researchers at MIT have created a machine-learning framework that distinguishes shared and unique information across different cellular measurement modalities, aiding scientists in understanding cell states and disease mechanisms more efficiently.

items.title: TELUS Digital Uncovers 'Robustness Paradox' in AI Persona Prompting
items.summary: A TELUS Digital study reveals that persona prompting in LLMs causes shifts in moral judgments, creating risks for enterprise AI reliability; better role-playing models show larger inconsistencies.

items.title: BCG X and Nature Awards Launch 'AI for Discovery Award'
items.summary: BCG X AI Science Institute partners with Nature Awards to recognize AI-driven research teams advancing solutions in health, sustainability, and manufacturing.

items.title: AI Magazine Lists Top 10 LLM Fine-Tuning Tools
items.summary: AI Magazine highlights the leading tools from startups and tech giants enabling smarter deployment of fine-tuned large language models.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Nacon Files for Insolvency Amid Financial Crisis
items.summary: French video game publisher and developer Nacon has filed for insolvency on February 25, 2026, stating its assets cannot cover due liabilities after its majority shareholder's banking issues led to a €43 million debt crisis. The company, known for WRC, MXGP licenses, and sim racing products, is seeking financial restructuring to continue operations.[2][5]

items.title: BooztGames Expands Gaming Ad Network to 50+ Sites
items.summary: BooztGames announced expansion of its gaming-focused advertising network to over 50 sites, surpassing 19 million monthly ad impressions and 5 million pageviews, targeting gamers aged 18-34 in the US and Europe.[1]

items.title: Discord Delays Global Age Verification Rollout to H2 2026
items.summary: Discord has postponed its global age verification rollout to the second half of 2026 after failing initial implementation, with co-founder acknowledging the setback while emphasizing the need for teen safeguards and adding more verification options.[3]

items.title: Xbox Reaffirms Commitment to First-Party Games Publishing
items.summary: Xbox CEO Asha Sharma and Chief Content Officer Matt Booty stated in an interview that Xbox remains committed to being a first-party games publisher, addressing multiplatform strategy and generative AI.[4]

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Texas Instruments Slashes 2026 CapEx Outlook, Targets $8+ Free Cash Flow Per Share
items.summary: Texas Instruments reduced its 2026 capital expenditure guidance to $2-3 billion as it nears completion of major capacity expansions. The company is focusing growth on industrial, automotive, and data center markets, and plans to acquire Silicon Labs for enhanced embedded wireless connectivity, with closing expected in H1 2027.

items.title: Uber Launches Autonomous Solutions Business
items.summary: Uber Technologies has unveiled a new autonomous solutions arm that provides tools and services to help partners develop and commercialize autonomous vehicles globally.

items.title: Applied Materials Stock Jumps 8% on Strong Q1 FY2026 Results
items.summary: Semiconductor equipment manufacturer Applied Materials saw its stock surge 8% following the release of its fiscal 2026 first-quarter results for the quarter ended in January.
